content.en:
Terran, entrance to the ruins of Blackwind Mountain.

At this time, a large number of True Monarchs were hidden in the void, staring at the entrance of the Black Wind Mountain Ruins.

And inside the space rings of these True Monarchs, there are a group of weak galaxy-level creatures, who are the little geniuses under their command.

These forces are ready to send these little geniuses into the ruins of Black Wind Mountain, so that they can enter the blood pool and transform into even more demonic geniuses.

In this way, their forces can harvest a group of geniuses in the future, and they will have a small improvement in their respective forces.

And the Void Heaven Temple naturally would not do nothing, they also sent a large number of True Monarchs to guard the Black Wind Mountain Ruins, after all, the human race is also a force under the command of the Void Heaven Palace.

Coupled with the fact that Ye Tian was still the Daoist of the Void Heaven Temple, and he was also the number one powerhouse on the True Monarch List, how could they not care about the human race.

Just when the ruins of Black Wind Mountain were about to begin, Ye Tian came here to tear the space.

"I've seen the Ten Thousand Laws!"

"I've seen the Ten Thousand Laws!"

"I've seen the Ten Thousand Laws!"

A True Monarch of the Void Heaven Hall bowed his waist and said respectfully.

Ye Tian nodded slightly, and immediately copied the talent to probe the true monarchs around him.

"Come out!"

Ye Tian said coldly.

Whoa!!!

One by one, the True Monarch came out of the void, and the dense figure gave some of the Terrans present an unimaginable horror.

These human races are not strong, their knowledge is shallow, and they have not seen many true monarchs, that is, those true monarchs of the human race, where have they seen such a formation!

Now, the true monarchs who appear here are not only hundreds or thousands, but at least tens of millions!

This is still because the value of the relics of the human race is not too great, otherwise it would be hundreds of millions.

There are tens of millions of true monarchs in the Void Heaven Palace, and it stands to reason that there should be no fear of these tens of millions of true monarchs, but it is impossible for the Void Heaven Temple to send all the true monarchs, otherwise how can they guard the territory of other true kingdoms?

Besides, among these tens of millions of true monarchs, they are all elites, many of them are relatively powerful true monarchs, and there are more than one number of true monarchs on the list of true monarchs!

"Everyone, this relic appeared in the Void Heaven True Country, and it should belong to the Void Heaven True Country!"

Ye Tian said.

"Ten Thousand Laws Daozi, the ruins of the Heavenly Ape Sect have appeared in the Vajra True Kingdom, aren't they also shared?, why should you have the ruins of the Void Heaven True Kingdom, and you should enjoy them exclusively in the Void Heaven True Kingdom?" a True Monarch sneered.

"The value of the relics of the Heavenly Ape Sect is too great, and with the intervention of the Dao Ancestor, the King Kong True Kingdom naturally cannot be monopolized. But this ruin is just a small ruin, there are only a few buildings inside, and only creatures below the cosmic god are allowed to enter, except for making the talent better, there is not much benefit! The major forces are not short of geniuses, there are countless territories in Chaos, and it is not difficult to want genius disciples at all. Therefore, the value of this relic is not high, and I believe that our Void Heaven True Realm is qualified to monopolize this relic!"

Ye Tianlang said.

"Wanfa Daozi, no matter how much you say, it's useless, even if the value of this relic is not high, but it is also a domain realm relic, who knows if there will be a more precious inheritance in the future?

The person who spoke was the Dragon Shore True Monarch, who was ranked 320th on the True Monarch List, with the blood of the Chaos True Dragon, and his strength was not weak.

"This is the Void Heaven True Country, and it is my territory, I can mobilize the power of the Void Heaven True Country. The strength is stronger than usual, do you really want to force it?"

Ye Tian threatened in a cold voice.

Rumble!!!!!

The momentum of the millions of True Monarchs sent by the Void Heaven Hall this time burst out in unison, coupled with the large array that had already been arranged here, coupled with the blessing of the power of the Void Heaven True Kingdom, the momentum of the envoy Million True Monarchs was comparable to the momentum of nearly ten million True Monarchs.

At this time, the true monarchs of the top powers were stunned.

In their opinion, there is no need for a big war today, as long as there is a threat, the Void Heaven True Kingdom will definitely give in, after all, it is just a relic, and it is not a loss to allocate some places to them.

But I never thought that Ye Tian, the Taoist of Ten Thousand Laws, would actually fight with them?

At this moment, many people hesitated.

If this relic can improve their strength, and there is an amazing opportunity, they will certainly not be afraid of battle.

But at the moment, the value of this relic is limited, it is only useful to weak creatures, and it is of no use to them as true monarchs, is it worth fighting for this useless opportunity?

It is with these in mind that many true monarchs are intimidated.

Seeing that the morale of the True Monarch Coalition was weakened, some of the top powerful people in power immediately understood that something had to be done, otherwise they would not be able to gain benefits today.

Rumble!!!!

A True Monarch stood up and locked on Ye Tian with momentum.

"Wanfa Daozi, you are not allowed to mobilize the power of the Void Heaven True Country, you and I will fight, if you win, I will withdraw from the competition, if you lose, our Giant Axe City will have 10,000 ruins!"

This True Monarch is the No. 1 True Monarch in Giant Axe City, and he is also the third-ranked Black Striped True Monarch on the True Monarch List.

He was covered in black lines, which looked very weird, but it was a characteristic of a powerful physique, called the Black Pattern Divine Body, and it was also one of his pride, so he never hid these black lines.

Because of this, he has the name of the Black Striped True Monarch.

"Ten thousand!"

Ye Tian secretly sneered.

The number of places in the relics of Black Wind Mountain is only 100,000, and only about 100,000 creatures are allowed to enter each time, and 10,000 places already occupy one-tenth.

However, Ye Tian didn't care about these things anymore.

Because, he won't lose!

"Okay, I promise!"

Ye Tian nodded.

A void.

Ye Tian confronted the Black Striped True Monarch, there was no one around, this was a battlefield that belonged to them, and no one disturbed them.

Rumble!!!!

The Black Striped True Monarch took out a black giant axe, but as soon as this giant axe came out, many True Monarchs changed color.

"Dao Weapon!"

"How can it be a Dao weapon? Zhenjun can't use a Dao weapon!"

"It's not a Dao weapon, but it's not a half-Dao weapon, it should be a Dao weapon that has failed to be refined on purpose, that is, a pseudo-Dao weapon between a half-Dao weapon and a Dao weapon. This kind of Dao weapon is very rare, after all, refining Dao weapons is basically a success or failure, once it fails, the Dao weapon will be abandoned, and only in rare cases a part of the power of the Dao weapon is retained, this is a pseudo-Dao weapon. The Pseudo-Dao weapon has a lifespan, and every time you fight, it is a damage to the Pseudo-Dao weapon. "

"It turned out to be a pseudo-Taoist weapon, the black vein true monarch has never used a pseudo-Taoist weapon, this is probably his hole card, I didn't expect to use it today!"

"No, no, the Ten Thousand Laws Daozi is the first on the True Monarch List, and the Black Striped True Monarch is the third on the True Monarch List, the gap between the two sides may not be big, but the winning rate of the Black Striped True Monarch will definitely be lower, if he wants to win, then he must come up with a pseudo-Dao weapon!"

......

"The giant axe of the pseudo-Taoist weapon is really rich!"

Ye Tian sighed.

He didn't have such a weapon, he couldn't even buy it, and Giant Axe City was worthy of being a force that surpassed the Void Heaven lineage, and even possessed such a pseudo-Dao weapon.

"It's just that even if you have a pseudo-Dao weapon, you are not my opponent, the gap between us is too big!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Rumble!

The battle is on!

The black-veined lines on the Black-veined True Monarch's body seemed to come to life, exuding endless black light, and he held the Pseudo-Daoist Giant Axe and struck hard, and there was an aura of Origin Divine Power on the axe light.

This is the origin of the black vein true monarch's fame - the edge!

The Blade Origin Divine Power combined with the Giant Axe Combat Skill can burst out with terrifying attack power.

He once relied on this move to kill a true ancestor who was not weak in one blow.

The Edge Origin Divine Power has a locking effect, which cannot be dodged, but can only be hit hard.

And Ye Tian did not crush this blow of the Black Pattern True Monarch, but fought against this blow in a more shocking way.

"Blood River True Body!"

"Kamui!"

"Golden Eye Realm!"

Rumble!

Under the shroud of the Golden Eye Realm, the blow of the Sharp Giant Axe was weakened, and coupled with the terrifying repulsive impact formed by the Origin Divine Power, it also weakened the blow of the Sharp Giant Axe.

In the end, although the sharp giant axe hit Ye Tian's body, it was easily attacked by the Blood River True Body, and even the skin was not broken.

"Impossible!"

A Ming Zhenjun exclaimed.

This is the full force of the Black Pattern True Monarch, and he hasn't even broken the defense of the Ten Thousand Laws Daozi, which is too unrealistic!

Ye Tian was not surprised by this result at all, he was the first on the True Monarch List, and the Black Striped True Monarch was the third on the True Monarch List, which seemed to be only two places away, but this was because the strongest on the True Monarch List could only be the first, which did not mean that Ye Tian was only a little stronger than the third.

Moreover, Ye Tian's most powerful side is defense, and it is naturally difficult for the Black Striped True Monarch to break Ye Tian's defense.

"Blocked, it is rumored in the outside world that the defense of the Ten Thousand Laws Daozi is invincible, and it is the most difficult true monarch, as expected, but I have not fully exerted the power of the pseudo-Dao weapon, and it is impossible to say who will win!"

The Black Striped True Monarch roared.

In the next moment, the Black Pattern True Monarch urged the power of the Dao weapon inside the pseudo-Dao weapon.

Suddenly, a terrifying coercion spread, causing many True Monarchs to tremble, as if a wisp of breath could annihilate their bodies.

This is the power of the apocryphal weapon!

That's when it happened.

Ye Tian also made a move!

The Golden Eye Realm enveloped the battlefield and suppressed the Black Striped True Monarch.

"What kind of means is this?"

Seeing a terrifying gaze in the underworld, the Black Striped True Monarch suddenly trembled, and a trace of fear rose in his heart.

Then, Ye Tian used the Origin Divine Power - God Destroying!

Ye Tian's Divine Soul became even more terrifying after cultivating the Golden Ape Alchemy Technique, so he completely injured the Divine Soul of the Black Striped True Monarch with a single blow.

Knock knock knock!!

The Black Striped True Monarch took a few steps back one after another, his face was pale, and his soul was traumatized.

Next, Ye Tian fought with the Black Striped True Monarch at close range, crushing the Black Striped True Monarch from beginning to end.

Even if the Black Pattern True Monarch had a pseudo-Dao weapon giant axe, the gap between them was too big, and there was no power to fight back at all.

At this moment, many True Monarchs really realized how powerful Ye Tian, the number one True Monarch on the list, was!

Distance.

Longhai True Monarch, who had already been promoted to the half-step True Ancestor realm, was also watching this battle, and when he saw Ye Tian's terrifying combat power, he was immediately shocked.

"The strength of this little junior brother is too strong, when I was in Zhenjun, my combat power was far inferior to him, and he didn't seem to have reached the limit of Zhenjun, no wonder Shizun kept praising this little junior brother. "

Long Hai Zhenjun muttered.

He didn't intervene in this battle, but his aura locked onto some other half-step True Ancestors.

His task was to stop some half-step True Ancestors from interfering, after all, the half-step True Ancestors already belonged to another level of powerhouses, and if they participated in the competition of True Monarchs, it would be enough for the True Monarchs to be a disaster.

Soon.

The battle was over, the Black Striped True Monarch was seriously injured and left, and the other True Monarchs in Giant Axe City also retreated one by one, which can be regarded as giving up this competition.

Just when Ye Tian thought that this battle was enough to deter other forces, the mutation happened again!
